name: Bald Eagle Territorial
sound_type: Territorial call -- long series piercing kek-kek-kek-kek
ecosystem: Nest territory. Active defense zone around eyrie.

vocalization.description: Rapid, extended sequence of 15-30+ percussive notes. kek-kek-kek-kek. Louder, more urgent than contact call.
vocalization.function: Nest defense, boundary announcement, intruder response, feeding hierarchy assertion
vocalization.posture: Head lowered, beak open, body forward -- directed at intruder
vocalization.escalation: Call → approach flight → aerial display → potential physical contact

connections.description: Contact call (E=5, 4-10 notes, descending, private). This is the public escalation.
Hammerbox / Carrie Akre (E=6). Territorial assertion in competitive environment. Same gesture, different kingdom.
Golden Eagle (Aquila chrysaetos). Different genus. Rarer, more ecologically powerful. Transition after Bald Eagle arc.

milestones: LARGEST BIRD NEST IN N AMERICA DOCUMENTED
